title: potentilla × ternata
intro: Potentilla × ternata, also known as Five-leaved potentilla, is a hybrid flowering plant derived from the potentilla family, combining the characteristics of Potentilla reptans and Potentilla angustata. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Potentilla × ternata include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, as well as being used in topical applications for skin issues and wounds.
